title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at CDAC Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at CDAC Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? CDAC Consulting Pvt Ltd in Lucknow offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About CDAC Consulting Pvt Ltd:
CDAC Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CDAC Consulting Pvt Ltd!
